educational_objective: First-word picture books for pointing, naming and short shared looks as words arrive.
age_stage_nuance: Versus earlier face-only board books: now the job is pointing at a clear word page and hearing the name.
what_to_look_for: Clear labels, board pages, 0–3 or toddler marks, UK publisher or bookshop PDPs.
what_to_avoid: Guessed Penguin IDs, Amazon bot walls, 3+ only marks, sound-button books as Top 10.
methodology: Benchmarked Priddy, Ladybird Baby Touch, Barefoot, DK, Dear Zoo, Spot, Hungry Caterpillar and That’s Not My on Priddy, Barefoot, Penguin and Bookshop.org UK. Captured age marks. Ranked photo catalogue, touch words, illustrated words, talk along, texture words, animals, flaps, seek, food naming, texture describing. Brand caps at two. URL and availability verified 2026-07-24.
buying_factor_memo: Order follows clearest first word pointing jobs first, then touch and illustrated variety, then flap and seek naming, then food and describing words. Brand caps keep Priddy and Ladybird at two in Top 10. Buyable UK publisher and Bookshop.org PDPs beat guessed Penguin IDs and Amazon bot walls.

top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A sturdy Priddy board book of clear photo pages with everyday first words to point at across home, food, animals and more.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Finding words at sixteen to eighteen months often means pointing at a clear photo and hearing you name it. First 100 Words keeps pages chunky and pictures uncluttered. Best when you want one photo catalogue you can open for two minutes between meals without a story plot.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #1 over #2: clearest photo first word catalogue; Baby Touch Words is touch led naming.
top_picks.caveats: Large catalogue; follow their interest, do not finish every page.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip a second First 100 if one already lives by the sofa.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Priddy Books UK buyable First 100 Words; 0–2y; verified 2026-07-24.

age_signals.raw_text: Baby Touch first words board book

top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Ladybird Baby Touch board book pairing simple first words with touch patches for short look, feel and name minutes.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Some toddlers need a finger job before they will stay for a word. Baby Touch Words pairs a patch with a label so pointing has something to do. Choose when photo catalogues already seem dry and you want touch led naming without a long story.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #2 over #3: touch led first words; Barefoot is illustrated word scenes.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if Baby Touch Words already sits in the basket.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Bookshop.org UK buyable Baby Touch Words; Ladybird imprint; verified 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A lift the flap board book of animals sent by the zoo, inviting toddlers to open, look and name each creature on a short shared read.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Flaps turn naming into a job with a clear next move. Dear Zoo keeps the animal list familiar without a photo catalogue. Best when first word catalogues already cover pointing and you want a short story style naming pattern with flaps.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #3 over #4: flap naming classic; Spot is seek and name.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if Dear Zoo already lives on the shelf.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Bookshop.org UK buyable Dear Zoo; verified 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Spot lift the flap board book for seeking and naming as you open doors and look for the puppy on a short shared read.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Seek and name keeps first words tied to a game they already understand. Spot flaps give a clear place to look next on each page. Choose when Dear Zoo already covers animal flaps and you want a seek story with the same naming job.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #4 over #5: seek and name Spot; Hungry Caterpillar is food naming.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if Spot already lives on the shelf.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Penguin UK buyable Where’s Spot; verified 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Barefoot board book of illustrated everyday first words in warm scenes, sized for short shared pointing without photo clutter.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Photo pages are not the only way into first words. Barefoot scenes keep labels clear while the art stays calmer than a dense catalogue. Best when Priddy photos already live on the shelf and you want an illustrated word book for quieter sofa minutes.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #5 over #6: illustrated word scenes; Ladybird faces is face pointing.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Barefoot Books UK buyable Baby’s First Words; re-verified buyable 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Ladybird Baby Touch faces board book with high contrast faces to look at, touch and name on short shared reads.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Face words show up in every mirror and photo on the phone. Baby Touch Faces keeps naming concrete without a dense hundred word spread. Choose when Baby Touch Words already covers general labels and you want a second Ladybird focused on faces.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #6 over #7: second Ladybird face naming; Puppy is texture naming.
top_picks.ownership_note: Pick Words OR Faces first if buying one Baby Touch.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Penguin UK buyable Baby Touch Faces; verified 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A touchy feely dinosaur board book with patches to feel while you name textures and simple describing words on short looks.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Touch patches keep describing words going when photo catalogues lose them. Dinosaur pages give a different theme from everyday object lists on the sofa. Choose when Ladybird touch books already cover one line and you want Usborne style texture naming.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #7 over #8: texture naming; Priddy Animals is photo animals.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if a That’s Not My title already sits in the basket.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Bookshop.org UK That’s Not My Dinosaur buyable 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A board book of baby faces from around the world, inviting short looks and simple naming of faces, smiles and families.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Face pages still help first words when catalogues seem dense. Global Babies keeps the job to looking and naming faces without a hundred object grid. Choose when Ladybird Faces already covers high contrast art and you want photo babies instead.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #8 over #9: photo baby faces; Priddy Animals is animal photos.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if Global Babies already sits nearby.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A Priddy See, Touch, Feel board book pairing first words with textures to touch during short shared looks and naming.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Texture pages buy you another minute of attention when plain photos lose them. See, Touch, Feel First Words keeps labels simple while fingers stay busy on the page. Best as the second Priddy when First 100 Words already covers photo pointing.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #9 over #10: second Priddy texture words; Hello Baby Faces is faces theme.
top_picks.ownership_note: Pick First 100 OR See Touch Feel first if buying one Priddy.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Priddy Books UK buyable See Touch Feel First Words; re-verified 2026-07-24.

top_picks.safety_notes: Board book; supervise flaps and patches.
top_picks.rating_source: Publisher or bookshop PDP; on-page review aggregate not published
top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: A touchy feely board book of puppies with patches to feel while you name soft, rough and other simple describing words.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Describing words arrive beside object names when fingers meet a patch. That is Not My Puppy keeps the pattern short and familiar on the sofa. Choose when Dinosaur already covers one touchy feely theme and you want a puppy version too.
top_picks.rank_rationale: #10: second Fiona Watt texture theme after Dinosaur.
top_picks.caveats: Second Fiona Watt; brand cap full. Bookshop may flake.
top_picks.ownership_note: Do not buy Puppy and Dinosaur together as first gifts.
top_picks.evidence_notes: Bookshop.org UK Puppy; Hello Baby Faces Priddy alternate if smoke flakes.

skips.skip_reason: Many Usborne first word spin-offs carry 2+/3+ marks that fail 16-18m overlap.
Amazon UK bot wall blocked product page verification.
Noise buttons fight quiet pointing for this band.
skips.evidence_notes: Category exclusion; Baby Touch Words URL is host placeholder only.

skips.skip_reason: Waterstones often 403 or soft-wrong titles in this research environment.
Guessed Penguin numeric IDs resolve to unrelated titles; never use as primary.

guidance_notes.title: Borrow first
guidance_notes.body: Check which first word books you already own before doubling photo catalogues.

ingestion_ready.founder_review_notes: Mode A re-research after FF quarantine 2026-07-24; copy/URL fixes; stop before ingest.
